use std::mem::MaybeUninit;

fn create_uninit_array() -> [u32; 10] {
    let arr = MaybeUninit::<[u32; 10]>::uninit();
    unsafe { arr.assume_init() }
}

fn partial_init() -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut buf = Vec::with_capacity(100);
    unsafe {
        buf.set_len(100);
    }
    buf
}

fn uninit_struct() -> Config {
    let config = MaybeUninit::<Config>::uninit();
    unsafe { config.assume_init() }
}

struct Config {
    port: u16,
    debug: bool,
    name: String,
}
